measures.name: Latest Snapshot Date
measures.description: Most recent snapshot date present in the DPD snapshot table.

measures.name: Latest Reporting Date
measures.description: Most recent reporting date present in the monthly loss table.

measures.name: Selected Period Label
measures.expression:
VAR _d = SELECTEDVALUE ( dim_calendar[Date], [Latest Reporting Date] )
RETURN FORMAT ( _d, "MMM-YYYY" )
measures.description: Human-readable label for the currently selected period.

measures.name: Pool Factor
measures.description: Current outstanding ÷ original — pool amortisation indicator.

measures.name: Pool Balance at Snapshot
measures.expression:
CALCULATE (
    SUM ( fact_dpd_snapshot[CurrentBalance] ),
    fact_dpd_snapshot[SnapshotDate] = [Latest Snapshot Date]
)
measures.description: Sum of current balance across loans at the latest snapshot.

measures.name: WAC %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[InterestRate] * fact_loan[CurrentBalance] ),
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[CurrentBalance] )
)
measures.description: Weighted average coupon (balance-weighted).

measures.name: WAM Months
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[RemainingTerm] * fact_loan[CurrentBalance] ),
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[CurrentBalance] )
)
measures.description: Weighted average remaining maturity (months).

measures.name: WALA Months
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[MonthsOnBook] * fact_loan[CurrentBalance] ),
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[CurrentBalance] )
)
measures.description: Weighted average loan age (months on book).

measures.name: Weighted Avg LTV %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[LTV_Current] * fact_loan[CurrentBalance] ),
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[CurrentBalance] )
)
measures.description: Balance-weighted current LTV ratio.

measures.name: Weighted Avg DTI %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[DTI_Ratio] * fact_loan[CurrentBalance] ),
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[CurrentBalance] )
)
measures.description: Balance-weighted debt-to-income.

measures.name: Weighted Avg CIBIL
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[CIBIL_Score_Current] * fact_loan[CurrentBalance] ),
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[CurrentBalance] )
)
measures.description: Balance-weighted CIBIL score.

measures.name: Portfolio Yield %
measures.description: Gross asset yield (alias for WAC); net yield deducts servicer + trustee fees.

measures.name: Delinquency Rate %
measures.description: Share of loans that are 30+ days past due (loan count basis).

measures.name: NPA Balance
measures.expression:
CALCULATE (
    SUM ( fact_dpd_snapshot[CurrentBalance] ),
    fact_dpd_snapshot[SnapshotDate] = [Latest Snapshot Date],
    fact_dpd_snapshot[RBI_SMA_Class] = "NPA"
)
measures.description: Non-performing balance per RBI classification at latest snapshot.

measures.name: GNPA Ratio %
measures.description: Gross NPA ratio — alias of NPA % retained for regulatory cross-referencing.

measures.name: Net NPA Balance
measures.expression:
VAR _gnpa = [NPA Balance]
VAR _provns =
    CALCULATE ( SUM ( fact_loan[ECL_Provision] ), fact_loan[IFRS9_Stage] = 3 )
RETURN MAX ( _gnpa - _provns, 0 )
measures.description: NPA balance net of Stage-3 ECL provisions (floored at zero).

measures.name: Net NPA %
measures.expression: DIVIDE ( [Net NPA Balance], [Pool Balance at Snapshot] )

measures.name: CDR Annualised %
measures.description: Annualised constant default rate: 1 − (1 − MDR)^12.

measures.name: SMM Avg %
measures.description: Single Monthly Mortality — share of EOP balance prepaid per month.

measures.name: CPR Calc %
measures.description: CPR derived from SMM as a cross-check on the reported CPR.

measures.name: ECL Coverage %
measures.description: Portfolio-level ECL ÷ EAD coverage.

measures.name: Stage 3 Coverage %
measures.description: Stage-3 ECL as a share of Stage-3 EAD — impairment intensity.

measures.name: Weighted Avg PD %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[PD_Estimate] * fact_loan[EAD] ),
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[EAD] )
)
measures.description: EAD-weighted probability of default.

measures.name: Weighted Avg LGD %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[LGD_Estimate] * fact_loan[EAD] ),
    SUMX ( fact_loan, fact_loan[EAD] )
)
measures.description: EAD-weighted loss given default.

measures.name: ECL Calculated
measures.description: Validation: live PD × LGD × EAD vs. stored ECL_Provision.

measures.name: Stage Migration Net %
measures.expression:
VAR _to_worse = CALCULATE ( [Loan Count], fact_loan[IFRS9_Stage] > 1 )
RETURN DIVIDE ( _to_worse, [Loan Count] )
measures.description: Share of loans not in Stage 1.

measures.name: 12-Month ECL
measures.description: 12-month ECL bucket per IFRS 9 §5.5.5 (Stage 1).

measures.name: Lifetime ECL
measures.description: Lifetime ECL bucket per IFRS 9 §5.5.3 (Stages 2 & 3).

measures.name: Stressed ECL
measures.expression:
VAR _pdm = [Scenario PD Multiplier]
VAR _lgdm = [Scenario LGD Multiplier]
VAR _haircut = [Scenario Recovery Haircut %]
RETURN
    SUMX (
        fact_loan,
        MIN ( fact_loan[PD_Estimate] * _pdm, 1 ) *
        MIN ( fact_loan[LGD_Estimate] * _lgdm * ( 1 + _haircut ), 1 ) *
        fact_loan[EAD]
    )
measures.description: Live-stressed ECL with PD & LGD caps at 100%.

measures.name: Stressed Loss to Senior Tranche
measures.description: Stressed loss absorbed by tranche TR-A (Senior).

measures.name: Stressed Loss to Mezz Tranche
measures.description: Stressed loss absorbed by tranche TR-B (Mezz).

measures.name: Stressed Loss to Equity Tranche
measures.description: Stressed loss absorbed by tranche TR-C (Equity).

measures.name: Tranche EOP Balance
measures.expression:
CALCULATE (
    SUM ( fact_tranche_cashflow[EOP_Balance] ),
    fact_tranche_cashflow[ReportingDate] = [Latest Reporting Date]
)

measures.name: Tranche Paydown %
measures.expression: DIVIDE ( [Tranche Original Balance] - [Tranche EOP Balance], [Tranche Original Balance] )

measures.name: Credit Enhancement %
measures.expression:
VAR _senior_bal =
    CALCULATE ( [Tranche EOP Balance], dim_tranche[TrancheID] = "TR-A" )
VAR _total_bal =
    CALCULATE ( [Tranche EOP Balance], ALL ( dim_tranche ) )
RETURN DIVIDE ( _total_bal - _senior_bal, _total_bal )
measures.description: Subordination remaining for the senior tranche.

measures.name: Cumulative Excess Spread
measures.expression:
CALCULATE (
    [Excess Spread],
    FILTER (
        ALL ( fact_loss_monthly ),
        fact_loss_monthly[ReportingDate] <= MAX ( fact_loss_monthly[ReportingDate] )
    )
)

measures.name: FPI Allocation
measures.expression:
CALCULATE (
    SUM ( dim_investor[InvestedAmount_INR] ),
    dim_investor[InvestorType] = "Foreign Portfolio Investor"
)

measures.name: Latest Vintage Net Loss %
measures.expression:
VAR _maxMOB =
    CALCULATE ( MAX ( fact_vintage[MonthsOnBook] ),
                ALLEXCEPT ( fact_vintage, fact_vintage[VintageID] ) )
RETURN
    CALCULATE (
        AVERAGE ( fact_vintage[CumulativeNetLossRate] ),
        fact_vintage[MonthsOnBook] = _maxMOB
    )

measures.name: Vintage Loss @ 12 MOB
measures.description: Cumulative net loss at 12 months on book.

measures.name: Vintage Loss @ 24 MOB
measures.description: Cumulative net loss at 24 months on book.

measures.name: Forward Roll Rate %
measures.expression:
VAR _denom =
    CALCULATE (
        COUNTROWS ( fact_dpd_snapshot ),
        fact_dpd_snapshot[DPD_Bucket_Prior] <> "Current"
    )
RETURN DIVIDE ( [Loans Forward Rolled], _denom )
measures.description: Forward rolls ÷ delinquent population at prior snapshot.

measures.name: Cure Rate %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    [Loans Backward Rolled],
    CALCULATE (
        COUNTROWS ( fact_dpd_snapshot ),
        fact_dpd_snapshot[DPD_Bucket_Prior] <> "Current"
    )
)

measures.name: Roll 30 to 60 %
measures.expression:
VAR _from =
    CALCULATE (
        COUNTROWS ( fact_dpd_snapshot ),
        fact_dpd_snapshot[DPD_Bucket_Prior] = "1-29 DPD"
    )
VAR _to =
    CALCULATE (
        COUNTROWS ( fact_dpd_snapshot ),
        fact_dpd_snapshot[DPD_Bucket_Prior] = "1-29 DPD",
        fact_dpd_snapshot[DPD_Bucket] = "30-59 DPD"
    )
RETURN DIVIDE ( _to, _from )
measures.description: Transition probability 1-29 DPD → 30-59 DPD.

measures.name: Roll 60 to 90 %
measures.expression:
VAR _from =
    CALCULATE (
        COUNTROWS ( fact_dpd_snapshot ),
        fact_dpd_snapshot[DPD_Bucket_Prior] = "30-59 DPD"
    )
VAR _to =
    CALCULATE (
        COUNTROWS ( fact_dpd_snapshot ),
        fact_dpd_snapshot[DPD_Bucket_Prior] = "30-59 DPD",
        fact_dpd_snapshot[DPD_Bucket] = "60-89 DPD"
    )
RETURN DIVIDE ( _to, _from )
measures.description: Transition probability 30-59 DPD → 60-89 DPD.

measures.name: Net Loss YTD
measures.description: Year-to-date net loss, Indian fiscal year (1 Apr – 31 Mar).

measures.name: Pool Balance Prior Month
measures.expression: CALCULATE ( [Current Pool Balance], DATEADD ( dim_calendar[Date], -1, MONTH ) )

measures.name: Pool Balance MoM Change %
measures.expression: DIVIDE ( [Current Pool Balance] - [Pool Balance Prior Month], [Pool Balance Prior Month] )

measures.name: Cumulative Net Loss
measures.expression:
CALCULATE (
    SUM ( fact_loss_monthly[NetLoss_ThisMonth] ),
    FILTER (
        ALL ( fact_loss_monthly[ReportingDate] ),
        fact_loss_monthly[ReportingDate] <= MAX ( fact_loss_monthly[ReportingDate] )
    )
)

measures.name: Rolling 12M Default Rate %
measures.expression:
VAR _maxDate = MAX ( fact_loss_monthly[ReportingDate] )
VAR _minDate = EDATE ( _maxDate, -11 )
RETURN
    CALCULATE (
        AVERAGE ( fact_loss_monthly[MonthlyDefaultRate] ),
        FILTER (
            ALL ( fact_loss_monthly ),
            fact_loss_monthly[ReportingDate] >= _minDate &&
            fact_loss_monthly[ReportingDate] <= _maxDate
        )
    )

measures.name: State Rank by ECL
measures.expression:
RANKX (
    ALL ( dim_geography[State] ),
    [Total ECL],
    ,
    DESC,
    Dense
)

measures.name: Top 5 Risky States ECL
measures.expression:
VAR _rank = [State Rank by ECL]
RETURN IF ( _rank <= 5, [Total ECL], BLANK () )

measures.name: Servicer Rank by Balance
measures.expression:
RANKX (
    ALL ( dim_servicer[ServicerName] ),
    [Current Pool Balance],
    ,
    DESC,
    Dense
)

measures.name: Top 10 Borrower Share %
measures.expression:
VAR _top10 =
    TOPN ( 10, VALUES ( fact_loan[BorrowerID] ), [Current Pool Balance], DESC )
VAR _top10_bal =
    CALCULATE ( [Current Pool Balance], _top10 )
RETURN DIVIDE ( _top10_bal, CALCULATE ( [Current Pool Balance], ALL ( fact_loan ) ) )
measures.description: Concentration ratio — top 10 borrower balance share.

measures.name: Expected Loss (Annual)
measures.description: One-year EL approximation for RAROC denominator.

measures.name: Risk-Adjusted Return on Assets %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    [Annualised Gross Interest Revenue] - [Expected Loss (Annual)],
    [Current Pool Balance]
)

measures.name: Tranche Yield Realised %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    [Cumulative Tranche Interest Paid],
    AVERAGE ( fact_tranche_cashflow[BOP_Balance] )
) * 12

measures.name: Heat 30+ DPD Colour
measures.description: Conditional-format colour for the 30+ DPD KPI.

measures.name: Heat Stage Mix Colour
measures.expression:
VAR _stg3 = DIVIDE ( [Stage 3 Balance], [Current Pool Balance] )
RETURN
    SWITCH (
        TRUE (),
        _stg3 >= 0.10, "#C62828",
        _stg3 >= 0.05, "#EF6C00",
        _stg3 >= 0.02, "#F9A825",
        "#2E7D32"
    )
measures.description: Conditional-format colour driven by Stage-3 balance share.

measures.name: KPI Headline Risk Status
measures.expression:
SWITCH (
    TRUE (),
    [Stressed ECL] / [Total EAD] >= 0.10, "🔴 CRITICAL — Tail risk exposed",
    [Stressed ECL] / [Total EAD] >= 0.05, "🟠 ELEVATED — Active monitoring",
    [Stressed ECL] / [Total EAD] >= 0.02, "🟡 WATCH — Within tolerance",
    "🟢 HEALTHY — Within risk appetite"
)
measures.description: Traffic-light commentary card driven by stressed ECL coverage.
